## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New integration
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactoring

## Testing

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Existing tests still pass

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] No new warnings
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
